projects.title: Unity CI/CD Automation Pipeline
projects.summary: Developed a CI/CD automation pipeline for Unity builds using Fastlane, integrating Discord bot commands for remote control and TestFlight uploads.

outcome.details: Enabled remote-controlled builds directly from Discord, increasing iteration efficiency for QA and design teams.

projects.title: Braverse (CookieRun IP – Outsourcing Project)
projects.summary: A web-based interactive tutorial teaching players how to play Braverse, a Trading Card Game (TCG) based on the CookieRun IP franchise.

outcome.details: Building tutorial systems and ensuring gameplay clarity for new players learning Braverse TCG mechanics.

projects.title: Wacky Boat
projects.summary: A fast-paced mobile action game currently under development, featuring a modular core gameplay system and automated CI/CD pipeline for streamlined development.

outcome.metric: Active development with automated deployment pipeline
outcome.details: Core gameplay system enables team to iterate efficiently; CI/CD pipeline streamlines iOS testing and builds.

projects.title: Soul of Butterflies – Incubation
projects.summary: A narrative puzzle adventure independently developed, crowdfunded, exhibited at gaming events, and commercially released.

outcome.details: Exhibited at gaming events and received positive player feedback.

projects.title: Tarowl: Pocket Tarot
projects.summary: An AI-powered tarot reading app built with Flutter frontend and TypeScript backend using Google Cloud Platform services.

outcome.metric: Released to app store and iterated via user feedback

projects.title: Emotional Management – Interactive Game
projects.summary: An emotional-learning educational game for the U.S. market, designed to support students' emotional regulation through interactive gameplay.

outcome.metric: Completed and launched with smooth delivery
outcome.details: Helped refine gameplay to fit educational use and emotional learning objectives.

experience.description: Leading game planning, Unity development, and project management for multiple commercial titles including Braverse (CookieRun IP with Devsisters) and Wacky Boat. Built core gameplay systems, CI/CD pipelines, and production infrastructure.
Developed and released the indie game 'Soul of Butterflies – Incubation' through crowdfunding and event exhibitions.
Organized and hosted events, including Google's Machine Learning Course, and managed cross-disciplinary collaborations among students.
